release_notes:
V18.4 Updates:

- Image Viewer: Scroll mouse wheel to zoom in/out on images.
- Image Viewer: Click and drag to pan/move around when zoomed in.
- Theft Calculator: UI redesigned to match a consistent table-aligned layout.
- Bug fixes and visual improvements.

previous_versions.release_notes:
V18.3 Updates:

- Theft Calculator now supports decimal Hours/Day input.
- Added exact interpreted time display beside hour inputs (HH hr MM min).
- Improved hours editing behavior to avoid auto-overwrite while typing.
- Enforced valid Hours/Day range of 0 to 24 with normalization on focus-out.
- Improved update check dialog when no new version is found by showing version details and feature notes.

V18.2 Updates:

- Added dark mode toggle in main search controls.
- Improved dark theme consistency across listboxes, canvases, menus, and notes/folders toggles.
- Fixed Tariff Category dropdown text clipping in Bill Calculator by expanding combobox sizing behavior.

V18.1 Updates:

- Tariff Manager now supports adding and deleting tariff classes directly from the editor.
- Updated tariff structure includes Commercial Rate A(CM-II) and revised ED slabs.
- Theft fixed-demand calculation updated: load floor of 1 KVA, actual load for >= 1 KVA, and month roundup for fixed demand.
- One-time tariff migration marker added to reset old tariff JSON once for this release and preserve edits afterward.
